productDisplayName: Locomotive Men Check Navy Blue Shirt
description: Composition Navy bue, blue, white and grey check shirt with red accents, made of 100% cotton, has a spread collar with a buttoned front placket, full sleeves with buttoned cuffs and mid-sleeve buttoned flaps, flap pockets on either chest with embroidered branding above the left one, and a curved hem Fitting Regular Wash care Machine wash at 40 degrees Wash dark colours separately Do not bleach Tumble dry normal or line dry Warm iron Crafted from soft cotton and cuts that offer a flattering Fit, this casual check shirt from Locomotiove offers exemplary comfort and is sure to become a wardrobe favourite. Either button the sleeves at the cuffs or roll them up and secure them with the mid-sleeve flaps for a more casual style. Pair it with jeans and sneakers. Model statistics The product is a size M on a model of height 6' and shoulders 18"
